markdown.markdown:
This chapter documents the Cloud Run workflow for generating daily and monthly VIIRS net primary productivity products. The workflow computes daily and monthly satellite-derived primary productivity products from VIIRS ocean color inputs using a containerized Cloud Run Job pattern. Products are supported for: - **NOAA-20 VIIRS** - daily and monthly productivity products - **SNPP VIIRS** - daily and monthly productivity products ## Repository structure ```text viirs-netpp/ ├── config/ │ ├── config.yml # Runtime settings │ └── requirements.txt # Python dependencies ├── deploy_job.sh # Build, push, and deploy Cloud Run jobs ├── Dockerfile # Container definition ├── entrypoint.sh # Job mode selector ├── scripts/ │ ├── control_viirs_netpp.py # Daily workflow controller │ ├── make_viirs_netpp.py # Daily productivity processor │ ├── control_viirs_netpp_monthly.py # Monthly workflow controller │ └── make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py # Monthly productivity processor └── templates/ ├── nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl # NOAA-20 daily template ├── nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl # NOAA-20 monthly template ├── nasa_snpp_4km.cdl # SNPP daily template └── nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl # SNPP monthly template ``` ## Cloud Run jobs The workflow runs as separate Cloud Run jobs, all built from the same container image and dispatched by `entrypoint.sh`. | Job mode | Script | Description | |---|---|---| | `daily` | `control_viirs_netpp.py` | Daily VIIRS productivity processing | | `monthly` | `control_viirs_netpp_monthly.py` | Monthly VIIRS productivity composites | ## Processing pipeline Each daily run follows this general sequence: ```text Cloud Scheduler → Cloud Run Job → Download inputs → Compute productivity → Apply template metadata → Publish to GCS → ERDDAP ingestion ``` The daily controller handles date selection, sensor configuration, input discovery, and calls the product generation script for each target date. ## Monthly composites Monthly processing is triggered through the monthly job mode. The monthly workflow gathers the required daily productivity files, builds a monthly composite, applies the appropriate CDL template, and publishes the final NetCDF output for ERDDAP. ## Templates and static assets The workflow uses CDL templates to define the output NetCDF structure and metadata. | File | Purpose | |---|---| | `nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl` | NOAA-20 daily NetCDF template | | `nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl` | NOAA-20 monthly NetCDF template | | `nasa_snpp_4km.cdl` | SNPP daily NetCDF template | | `nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl` | SNPP monthly NetCDF template | ## Codebase {.unnumbered} ```{=html}

Deployment

Container and job configuration.

  • Dockerfile
  • entrypoint.sh
  • deploy_job.sh
  • config.yml
  • requirements.txt

Daily scripts

Daily VIIRS productivity orchestration and processing.

  • control_viirs_netpp.py - daily workflow controller
  • make_viirs_netpp.py - daily productivity processor

Monthly composites

Monthly VIIRS productivity compositing.

  • control_viirs_netpp_monthly.py - monthly workflow controller
  • make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py - monthly composite builder

Templates and static assets

Reference CDL templates and static NetCDF structure definitions.

  • nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl
  • nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl
  • nasa_snpp_4km.cdl
  • nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl
```
